Building a record parser

This article explains how the parser validates each record before making it available to the rest of the application.

package parser

func Parse(input []byte) (Record, error) {
	if len(input) < headerSize {
		return Record{}, ErrShortInput
	}
	kind := input[0]
	length := int(input[1])
	if length > len(input)-headerSize {
		return Record{}, ErrInvalidLength
	}
	return Record{Kind: kind, Data: input[headerSize : headerSize+length]}, nil
}

The length check is performed before slicing so malformed input cannot cause the parser to access data outside the supplied buffer.
